category_sources: source_facts.description says scalable distributed time series database; official OpenTSDB manual describes it as a scalable distributed time series database.
display_name_sources: Official opentsdb.net documentation and GitHub organization style the project as "OpenTSDB"; source_facts.name is opentsdb.
docs_sources: Official opentsdb.net manual is the documentation index for OpenTSDB 2.4; opentsdb.net/docs/build/html is the generated official docs tree.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/OpenTSDB/opentsdb, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables indicate database CLI tooling; official overview/manual describe TSD, command-line utilities, monitoring data, and HBase/Bigtable storage.
